- I remain alert and aware of my surroundings, frequently checking for any movement or unusual activity.
- As I approach wider, better-lit streets, I transition to walking on the sidewalk, away from the curb, to avoid traffic and maintain visibility.
- I use streetlights and illuminated areas to maximize my visibility to others and to see my path clearly.
- I avoid distractions, such as using my phone, and keep my attention focused on my environment.
- I look out for vehicles and cross streets at designated crossings or well-lit areas.
- I continue to walk with purpose and confidence, minimizing time spent in isolated or dark areas.
